div.small: Check these FAQs before creating a ticket - you might find your answer here!

t.div: Data Privacy Notice: We process your personal data to handle your support requests. Please review our Privacy Policy before submitting this ticket.

div.label: I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy and consent to the processing of my data for helpdesk purposes.

t.p: Your consent for helpdesk data processing is already recorded. You can export or anonymize your helpdesk data at any time.

t.div: Please provide your consent to our Privacy Policy in order to create a support ticket.

t.p: No tickets yet. Create your first ticket

t.div: Your helpdesk-related personal data has been anonymized. Existing tickets now retain only non-identifying information.

div.p: You can review how we process your personal data in our Privacy Policy.
The helpdesk application stores the minimum personal data required to manage your support requests. You can export or anonymize this data using the options below.
Download a machine-readable export (JSON) of all helpdesk tickets, messages, and feedback associated with your account.

Anonymize personal data stored in helpdesk tickets associated with your account. Ticket records will be kept for operational and statistical purposes but will no longer contain identifying information about you.

button.onclick: return confirm('Are you sure you want to anonymize your helpdesk data? This action cannot be undone.');

div.p: This action affects only helpdesk data and does not delete your portal account or other business records.
Find answers to common questions and learn how to use our services

a.t-att-class: category_id == cat.id ? 'btn btn-sm btn-primary' : 'btn btn-sm btn-secondary'
filterby == filter[0] ? 'btn btn-sm btn-primary' : 'btn btn-sm btn-secondary'

div.p: No articles found. Please try a different search or filter.
Find quick answers to common questions

a.t-att-class: category_id == cat.id ? 'btn btn-sm btn-primary' : 'btn btn-sm btn-secondary'

div.p: No FAQs found. Please try a different search or category.
